case_title: PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC VS. BUN LOVE LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC DBA PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN PARTON. DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTENTED BY LEAH PLOTKIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE THE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC DBA PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC BUN LOVE LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC DBA PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC $2,257.26 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,322.26, CAL. LABOR CODE SECTION 2802 REQUIRES REIMBURSEMENT FOR EXPENDITURES INCURRED IN DIRECT CONSEQUENCE OF THE DISCHARGE OF DUTIES. THAT THERE EXPENSES WERE INCURRED FOR THE BENEFIT OF DEFENDANT WAS NOT DISPUTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,257.26 FILED BY PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC DBA PARTON THE INTERRUPTION LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BUN LOVE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
